programmes.show_description: Mary Millington is Queen of the Blues - Mayfair's most famous stripper. She must use her pleasing assets to defuse the ongoing criminal activity, surrounding the nightclub she performs in.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Keith Barron Narrates The Story Of Cherry & The Fairy Widower
As emotions deepen and past ties resurface, plans for an uprising move ahead amid uncertainty. Efforts to delay the conflict come too late, and events begin before support can arrive.
There's bad news for George about his daughter, bad news for Damien about a bet he's made and bad news for God about Sally - she's still a Christian...
Sally finds God and a somewhat dubious spiritual guide. Meanwhile, divorce is on the cards for George and something even nastier is on the cards for Dave.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
Flash and his new friend Roka invade Emperor Mings palace.
The true tale of Edith Thompson, a love triangle that ended in death for all three people involved.
Gyles Brandreth and Michele Brown explore stunning public gardens across South West England in this fun, informative series-perfect for beginners and expert gardeners alike.
Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
With Betty on holiday, temp Rose rattles Fred and upsets the factory routine.
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.
Music
Just out of jail Lou is dazzled by the stories Nan's old flame Wilf, who has made his fortune in Africa, tells and determines to emigrate.
Duffy has taken Craven on as first assistant painter, but their industrial relationship is soon strained. Something has to give, and it looks as though the result might be a rise in the unemployment.
Jane reflects on the past while trying to decide her future.
The paper faces pressure from authority figures unhappy with its reporting.
The Champions investigate the murder of three students in the Austrian Alps.
Tensions rise as plans collapse, loyalties are tested, and the cost of resistance grows. Personal conflicts and hidden motives strain the group amid escalating danger.
Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.
Fern Britton Narrates The Story Of Chambercombe Manor

Damien kicks some doors down and a visiting documentary crew causes problems for George, but not as many problems as his daughter causes.
Dave seeks psychiatric help and encounters problems with a trick cyclist.
A raw sexploitation classic! Escaping her brother, Bonnie hits the streets only to be ensnared by carjackers, a predatory artist, and a twisted gallery owner with a taste for human "pets".
The sensational follow-up to London in the Raw sets out to reflect society's decay through a sideshow spectacle of 1960s London depravity and vice. Sleaze guaranteed!
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.

Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
A chemist is accused of the murder of his fiancé's stepfather, who was determined to keep the two apart.
Dr. John Watson meets private detective Sherlock Holmes, and assists him in solving a case that has confused Inspector Lestrade.
Lady Beryl confesses to a murder that was committed at her home, but Sherlock Holmes is convinced that she is innocent.
Shop steward Harry threatens a strike; Fred scrambles to keep the factory running and his creditors at bay.
Fred eyes a better position but politics at work and home complicate his plans.
Betty gets cousin Albert a job; his chaos quickly disrupts the factory.
Taking a girlfriend home for the first time is always a nerve-racking experience. However, when you have a mother like Frankie's, the confrontation is particularly difficult!
Wedding bells are finally ringing for Duffy and Sharon and after all the traditional marriage day hang-ups, all they want is to be alone - but fate has one more trick in store.
Honeymoons should be unforgettable. Duffy and Sharon will always remember theirs in Majorca - but not for the usual reasons!
The Junior Gazette is taken over by the formidable Lynda Day, who immediately clashes with the papers existing staff.
Lynda investigates rumours surrounding the school, uncovering more than she expects.
The paper runs into trouble when a story exposes uncomfortable truths.
Three men find themselves in an atomic test area with a bomb due to go off at any time - if it does, it will destroy much of Australia.
Ken and Margaret are used to provide a false alibi for a thief and find themselves under police suspicion. Harry and a friend go for a gourmet weekend at a hotel owned by a restaurant critic.
After a major mission succeeds, the team faces a rescue crisis. Loyalties, grief, and impossible choices test everyone as they struggle to escape increasing danger.
New allies join the Resistance in the Alps as leadership shifts and plans for a larger operation emerge. But trust is fragile, and hidden loyalties threaten the group's safety.
A planned uprising moves forward while doubts and hidden loyalties cause growing tension. New alliances form, old ties resurface, and trust within the group becomes increasingly uncertain.

Jane is struggling to balance her job as an agony aunt with her failing marriage.
Jane tries to come to terms with Laurence leaving her.
Jane attempts to improve her relationship by making changes to herself.
Ken and Margaret are used to provide a false alibi for a thief and find themselves under police suspicion. Harry and a friend go for a gourmet weekend at a hotel owned by a restaurant critic.
Rik Mayall is a washed-up rock star who fights to revive his career, spinning bigger lies as the pressure mounts. Featuring Helena Bonham Carter.
A stylised cult Dracula tale starring Udo Kier as a count who must consume the blood of virgins to survive, courting a desperate Italian noble family while servant Mario plots his downfall.
